kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/addOrder path_url=/addOrder headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '42', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"trackingId": "9749", "password": "9749"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Could not add order after 1000 attempts
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:3000/deleteOrder path_url=/deleteOrder headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '42', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"trackingId": "9749", "password": "9749"}'
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Reason for rejection']' exists but is not displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//button[text()='Submit']' exists but is not displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

kw.name: Create Dictionary

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:3000/deleteOrder path_url=/deleteOrder headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '42', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"trackingId": "9325", "password": "9325"}'
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
